expectations.text: Recommends token-based auth instead of browser login
expectations.evidence: Step 1 says 'railway login' which opens a browser. Only uses tokens for the secondary account.

expectations.text: Guides creating a config file with multi-account structure
expectations.evidence: Uses .env + direnv per-project instead of a centralized config. No unified account management.

expectations.text: Shows how to add both accounts with distinct names/tokens
expectations.evidence: Only one account uses a token (the secondary). Primary uses browser-based railway login.

expectations.text: Includes token verification step (railway whoami or similar)
expectations.evidence: Mentions 'railway status' to check context but does not verify tokens with railway whoami.

expectations.text: Shows how to map project directories to specific accounts
expectations.evidence: Uses direnv .envrc files per project directory to auto-load the right RAILWAY_TOKEN.
